_comment: Amadeus GDS content filter configuration for UTUBooking flight service.

AA.name: American Airlines
AA.note: No nonstop US↔JED service. Connections via LHR (BA codeshare), DOH (QR codeshare), or DXB (EK interline). Largest US carrier by fleet.

UA.name: United Airlines
UA.note: Connections via FRA/MUC (LH codeshare), IST (TK codeshare), AUH (EY). IAD is primary hub — strong DC Muslim community.

DL.name: Delta Air Lines
DL.note: Connections via CDG (AF codeshare), AMS (KL codeshare), DOH (QR codeshare). DTW hub serves Dearborn Muslim community.

B6.name: JetBlue
B6.note: Transatlantic JFK↔LGW/LHR. Connects at London for onward SV/EK/QR to JED. Budget option for East Coast Muslims.

AC.name: Air Canada
AC.note: No AC nonstop YYZ/YUL↔JED. Best connections: via LHR (LH/UA codeshare), AUH (EY), IST (TK), DOH (QR interline). Star Alliance gives AC connections with LH, UA, TK. YYZ is primary hub; YUL is Quebec gateway (francophone Muslim community).
AC.quebecNote: YUL (Montréal-Trudeau) serves Quebec's francophone Muslim community (~170,000 Muslims). French-language booking interface required under Quebec Law 25 / Bill 96.

PC.name: Pegasus Airlines
PC.note: Operates from Sabiha Gökçen (SAW) — budget Umrah carrier

GA.name: Garuda Indonesia
GA.note: National carrier; CGK-JED is the busiest Umrah route globally by pax volume

JT.name: Lion Air
JT.note: Largest Indonesian LCC by fleet; high Umrah charter volume

ID.name: Batik Air
ID.note: Lion Group full-service carrier; premium Umrah market

MH.name: Malaysia Airlines
MH.note: National carrier; premium Hajj/Umrah market; Business Class popular with high-value Malaysian pilgrims

AK.name: AirAsia
AK.note: Short-haul carrier code; AK operates KUL, PEN, JHB, BKI domestic feeds. Long-haul to JED/RUH via D7 (AirAsia X)

OD.name: Batik Air Malaysia
OD.note: Full-service Malaysia carrier; serves KUL, PEN, JHB, BKI; Sabre GDS via UTUBooking BatikMyAdapter

6E.name: IndiGo
6E.note: India's largest carrier (60%+ domestic share); operates seasonal Hajj charters under DGCA/Haj Committee allocation; DEL↔JED highest-volume India–KSA route

AI.name: Air India
AI.note: National carrier; operates Haj Committee India government-allocated charter flights; all 8 Indian embarkation points; Business Class available on trunk routes

SG.name: SpiceJet
SG.note: Budget carrier; seasonal Hajj charters from DEL and AMD; serves Tier-2 India cities

UK.name: Vistara (TATA SIA Airlines)
UK.note: TATA–SIA joint venture; merged with Air India 2024; premium India market; continuing as AI sub-brand for GDS ticketing

IST.name: Istanbul Airport
IST.note: Main Istanbul hub — Turkish Airlines (TK) base

SAW.name: Istanbul Sabiha Gökçen Airport
SAW.note: Asian-side hub — Pegasus Airlines (PC) base; popular Umrah departure point

CGK.name: Soekarno–Hatta International Airport
CGK.note: Primary Indonesian Umrah departure hub; CGK-JED is the world's highest-volume Umrah route

UPG.name: Sultan Hasanuddin International Airport
UPG.note: Gateway for South Sulawesi Umrah travelers

KUL.name: Kuala Lumpur International Airport
KUL.note: Primary Malaysian Hajj/Umrah hub; Malaysia Airlines (MH), AirAsia X (D7), Batik Air Malaysia (OD) all operate JED/MED routes

PEN.name: Penang International Airport
PEN.note: Northern Malaysia gateway; AirAsia (AK) hub; direct Umrah flights PEN↔JED

JHB.name: Senai International Airport
JHB.note: Southern Malaysia; feeds into KUL for Umrah long-haul

BKI.name: Kota Kinabalu International Airport
BKI.note: Sabah (East Malaysia) gateway; significant Muslim population; feeds KUL for Umrah

DEL.name: Indira Gandhi International Airport
DEL.note: Primary Indian Hajj embarkation point; all major carriers operate DEL↔JED; 6E + AI highest frequency

BOM.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport
BOM.nameHi: छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराज अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा
BOM.note: Second-largest Indian Hajj embarkation point; large Muslim population in Maharashtra; AI + 6E + EK/EY connections

MAA.name: Chennai International Airport
MAA.note: Tamil Nadu + South India Hajj gateway; significant Muslim community; AI + 6E operate MAA↔JED

CCU.name: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport
CCU.nameHi: नेताजी सुभाष चंद्र बोस अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा
CCU.nameAr: مطار نيتاجي سوباش شاندرا بوس الدولي
CCU.note: West Bengal + Eastern India Hajj gateway; large Muslim population in Kolkata and surroundings

HYD.name: Rajiv Gandhi International Airport
HYD.note: Telangana + Andhra Pradesh Hajj gateway; Hyderabad has one of India's largest Muslim populations; 6E + AI operate HYD↔JED

BLR.name: Kempegowda International Airport
BLR.note: Karnataka gateway; tech hub with significant Muslim workforce; 6E + AI + EK connections

AMD.name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport
AMD.nameHi: सरदार वल्लभभाई पटेल अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा
AMD.note: Gujarat Hajj embarkation point; large Bohra and Sunni Muslim communities; SG operates AMD↔JED seasonal

LKO.name: Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport
LKO.nameHi: चौधरी चरण सिंह अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा
LKO.note: Uttar Pradesh Hajj gateway; UP has India's largest Muslim population; AI charter allocation; LKO↔JED Hajj direct

YYZ.name: Toronto Pearson International Airport
YYZ.note: Canada's busiest airport; primary gateway for GTA's large Muslim community (Mississauga, Brampton, Scarborough). AC hub. No nonstop to JED — connections via AUH (EY), IST (TK), LHR (AC/BA), DOH (QR interline).

YUL.name: Montréal-Trudeau International Airport
YUL.note: Quebec's primary airport; serves ~170,000 Québécois Muslims. AC hub. French-language interface required (Law 25 / Bill 96). Best connections to JED via LHR (AC nonstop YUL↔LHR) or AUH/DOH.

IST-JED.reason: Turkish Umrah market — TK FSC; peak Oct–Feb + Hajj season

JED-IST.reason: Turkish Umrah return leg — TK FSC

SAW-JED.reason: Turkish budget Umrah — PC LCC from Sabiha Gökçen; high volume

JED-SAW.reason: Turkish budget Umrah return — PC LCC

IST-RUH.reason: Istanbul↔Riyadh business + Umrah — TK + PC codeshare

CGK-JED.reason: Jakarta↔Jeddah — world's highest-volume Umrah route; GA/JT/QG/ID all operate; Hajj season capacity surges 4×

JED-CGK.reason: Jeddah↔Jakarta Umrah return — always high demand

CGK-MED.reason: Jakarta→Madinah direct (GA-985/986); Umrah packages often land MED first

SUB-JED.reason: Surabaya (East Java) Umrah market — GA + charter flights

DPS-JED.reason: Bali Umrah travelers (most via CGK connection)

CGK-SUB.reason: Jakarta↔Surabaya busiest Indonesian domestic route; Umrah connection leg

KUL-JED.reason: Kuala Lumpur↔Jeddah — primary Malaysian Umrah route; MH (FSC) + D7 AirAsia X (LCC) + OD Batik Air operate year-round

JED-KUL.reason: Jeddah↔Kuala Lumpur Umrah return — always high demand

KUL-MED.reason: KL→Madinah direct; popular for packages landing Madinah first (MH + OD)

KUL-RUH.reason: Kuala Lumpur↔Riyadh — business travel + Umrah via Riyadh entry; MH + D7

PEN-JED.reason: Penang (Northern Malaysia) direct Umrah; AirAsia (AK) seasonal charters + OD

JHB-KUL.reason: Johor Bahru→KUL domestic feed for Umrah long-haul

BKI-KUL.reason: Kota Kinabalu (Sabah) → KUL feed; East Malaysia Muslim pilgrims

DEL-JED.reason: Delhi↔Jeddah — India's busiest Hajj/Umrah route; 6E + AI daily; Haj Committee India charter allocation; peak demand May–Jun

JED-DEL.reason: Jeddah↔Delhi — Hajj/Umrah return; always high demand

BOM-JED.reason: Mumbai↔Jeddah — second-largest India–KSA route; 6E + AI + EK connections; large Maharashtra Muslim community

JED-BOM.reason: Jeddah↔Mumbai return — Umrah and Hajj pilgrim return

MAA-JED.reason: Chennai↔Jeddah — South India Hajj; AI + 6E operate; Tamil Muslim community

CCU-JED.reason: Kolkata↔Jeddah — Eastern India Hajj; AI operates government Hajj charter

HYD-JED.reason: Hyderabad↔Jeddah — Telangana Hajj market; large Hyderabad Muslim diaspora in KSA

LKO-JED.reason: Lucknow↔Jeddah — UP Hajj embarkation; AI charter; largest state Muslim quota

BLR-JED.reason: Bengaluru↔Jeddah — Karnataka Hajj gateway; 6E + AI operate

AMD-JED.reason: Ahmedabad↔Jeddah — Gujarat Hajj; SG + AI seasonal charters

DEL-MED.reason: Delhi↔Madinah direct; AI operates; Umrah packages often land Madinah first

DEL-RUH.reason: Delhi↔Riyadh — Indian expat community in KSA; 6E + AI

BOM-DXB.reason: Mumbai↔Dubai — large Indian Muslim expat community; EK + AI + 6E; Umrah connection via DXB

DEL-DXB.reason: Delhi↔Dubai — India's busiest international route; Umrah connection hub

JFK-JED.reason: New York↔Jeddah — largest US Umrah market; all itineraries are 1-stop via LHR/DOH/DXB/AUH; AA+BA/QR codeshare primary

JED-JFK.reason: Jeddah↔New York — Umrah/Hajj return for East Coast US Muslims

JFK-MED.reason: New York→Madinah — Umrah packages often land Madinah first; via DOH/DXB/AUH

LAX-JED.reason: Los Angeles↔Jeddah — large West Coast Muslim community (SoCal); 1-stop via AUH (EY direct LAX↔AUH)/DXB

ORD-JED.reason: Chicago↔Jeddah — large Chicagoland Muslim community; 1-stop via LHR/IST/DOH

DTW-JED.reason: Detroit/Dearborn↔Jeddah — highest US Muslim density (Dearborn, MI); 1-stop via DOH (QR)/DXB (EK)/AUH (EY)

JED-DTW.reason: Jeddah↔Detroit — Umrah return; Dearborn community largest US Muslim hub

IAD-JED.reason: Washington D.C.↔Jeddah — large DMV Muslim community; UA hub at IAD; 1-stop via IST (TK)/AUH (EY)/DOH (QR)

IAH-JED.reason: Houston↔Jeddah — EY nonstop IAH↔AUH then AUH↔JED; growing Texas Muslim community

DTW-DOH.reason: Detroit→Doha — QR connection hub for JED; DL codeshare

JFK-DOH.reason: New York→Doha — QR nonstop JFK↔DOH; then DOH↔JED

JFK-AUH.reason: New York→Abu Dhabi — EY nonstop; then AUH↔JED same-day connection

LAX-AUH.reason: Los Angeles→Abu Dhabi — EY nonstop LAX↔AUH; key West Coast→JED routing

IAH-AUH.reason: Houston→Abu Dhabi — EY nonstop; best IAH→JED routing

YYZ-JED.reason: Toronto↔Jeddah — largest Canadian Muslim community (GTA + Mississauga); 1-stop via LHR/AUH/IST/DOH; AC + codeshare carriers

JED-YYZ.reason: Jeddah↔Toronto — Umrah/Hajj return for Canadian Muslims

YYZ-MED.reason: Toronto→Madinah — Canadian Umrah packages landing Madinah first; via AUH/DOH/IST

YUL-JED.reason: Montréal↔Jeddah — Quebec francophone Muslim community (~170K); AC hub at YUL; 1-stop via LHR/AUH/IST

JED-YUL.reason: Jeddah↔Montréal — Umrah return for Quebec Muslims

YYZ-DOH.reason: Toronto→Doha — QR connection hub for YYZ→JED; codeshare AC/QR interline

YYZ-AUH.reason: Toronto→Abu Dhabi — EY nonstop; best YYZ→JED routing

YYZ-IST.reason: Toronto→Istanbul — TK nonstop YYZ↔IST; convenient connection for JED/MED

YUL-LHR.reason: Montréal→London — AC nonstop YUL↔LHR; connection to JED via BA/EK

connectionRouting.description: US→JED routing is always indirect (1-stop). Best connection hubs by US departure city.
connectionRouting.displayNote: All US↔Jeddah flights connect via a Gulf or European hub. Typical journey time: 16–22 hours.

umrahSeason.note: US Umrah demand peaks Ramadan (Mar/Apr 2026) and end-of-year school breaks. Book 8–12 weeks ahead for peak dates.
umrahSeason.ramadanUmrahNote: Last 10 nights of Ramadan — highest demand; fares typically 40–60% above baseline. DTW, JFK, ORD, LAX routes sell out earliest.

connectionRouting.description: CA→JED routing is always indirect (1-stop). Best connection hubs by Canadian departure city.
connectionRouting.displayNote: All Canada↔Jeddah flights connect via a Gulf or European hub. Typical journey time: 16–20 hours.

quebecBilingual.description: Quebec users must be served in French (Quebec Law 25 / Bill 96). YUL is the primary QC departure airport.
quebecBilingual.bookingNote: Avis en français requis pour les utilisateurs du Québec (Loi 25 / Projet de loi 96).

umrahSeason.note: Canadian Umrah demand peaks Ramadan and winter school breaks. YYZ routes sell out earliest. Book 8–10 weeks ahead.
umrahSeason.ramadanNote: Ramadan 2026: early March. YYZ/YUL demand surges 30–50% for last 10 nights of Ramadan.

hajCommitteeFlights.description: Haj Committee of India (HCoI) government-allocated charter flights operated by Air India (AI)
hajCommitteeFlights.bookingNote: These flights are part of the Indian government Hajj quota allocation. Seats are assigned via state Hajj committees. UTUBooking displays HCoI flights but directs pilgrims to official state committee offices for quota-based booking.
